programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - A Fine Family Feud'. Fran's plan for Maggie's Sweet Sixteen party stirs up an old Fine family feud.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Val's Apartment'. Fran and Val take a small apartment together when Fran feels that her job is taking over her personal life. Even though Mr Sheffield supports her, he really wants her to move back.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: 'S4/E19 - The Future Dunphys'. When Phil takes Claire to the hospital for her angiogram, they encounter a family that is basically their future selves, and they're not sure they like what they see.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: 'S4/E20 - Flip Flop'. Phil is initially confident in his ability to sell Claire and Cam's flipped house. Javier is visiting Manny and brings along his new girlfriend, which doesn't sit very well with Gloria.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous with Suzelle DIY
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Full Throttle'. Suzelle DIY is going full throttle with new best friend Danny K. Prepare for crashes, flips, rolls and harrowing footage caught on dash cams.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous with Suzelle DIY
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - European Vacation'. Most Ridiculous seeks out the stupidest and most insane videos to ever be found online.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - The Pancake Batter Anomaly'. When Sheldon gets sick, Leonard and the boys know what is in store for them and avoid him like the plague. This leaves an unsuspecting Penny to nurse the world's worst patient back to health.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - The Jerusalem Duality'. With Sheldon rattled and impossible to be around after meeting Dennis, a 15-year-old physicist who's smarter than him, the rest of the guys search for a way to eliminate the threat.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - The Bat Jar Conjecture'. The guys want to compete in the university's Physics Bowl. Sheldon's only focus is to prove his mental superiority, so they kick him off the team. To take his spot, they enlist his nemesis.

programme.title: Two And A Half Men
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Something Salty And Twisted'. After another snide remark from his mother, Alan vows to stop seeking the approval of women.

programme.title: Two And A Half Men
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Santa's Village of the Damned'. Alan starts dating a Martha Stewart-like perfectionist who takes command of the house during the holidays.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - A Tough Old Bird'. Bob and Abishola console a sad and volatile Kemi.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - TLC: Tunde's Loving Care'. Tunde schools a reluctant Bob on the art of home repair.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - The Pork Chop Indeterminacy'. Leonard, Wolowitz and Koothrappali become smitten over Sheldon's twin sister. Leonard devises a plan to eliminate his rivals.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - The Peanut Reaction'. Finding out that Leonard has never had a birthday party thrown for him, Penny convinces the guys to create a surprise party.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - Sights And Bites'. Abishola is nervous about Dele's trip to Nigeria

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - The Parents Strike Back'. Frustrated that the kids won't complete their chores, Adam and Andi decide to kick back and go on strike too.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Into The Weeds'. When Adam thinks Kate's boyfriend is a pothead, he decides to confront him, Don tells Lowell there are office rules he must follow, but Lowell suspects he is making them up.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Battle Of The Sexists'. When Adam needs to hire a new project manager, Andi accuses Adam of unconscious bias after he only interviews men for the job. Also, Andi helps Kate fight for a spot on the boys' soccer team at school.

programme.title: The Daily Show
programme.desc: 'S28/E5'. A comedic view of recent news and political figures by new host Trevor Noah, along with interviews with celebrity guests and political figures.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: 'S13/E5 - Melanie Ray & Chandler Clark'. A good Samaritan falls victim to a brutal crime, leading police on a manhunt for a pair of killers fuelled by envy and rage.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: 'S13/E6 - Erin Caffey & Charlie Wilkinson'. When a family falls victim to a devastating crime, the search for the killers lays bare a twisted romance and a motive no one can believe.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Prescription For Murder'. Investigators in L.A look into a cluster of mysterious overdose deaths of young men in their 20's and discover a Doctor who uses her prescription pad to line her pockets and kill her patients.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Bullets On Bourbon Street'. A beautiful young bartender is swept off her feet by a charismatic up-and-coming rapper. But when a night out takes a violent turn, she sacrifices everything to protect him.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Israel Keyes'. The case of Israel Keyes, who admitted to being a rapist, arsonist, burglar, bank robber and serial killer. Keyes saw the U.S as a hunting ground for killing and other criminal activities.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Prescription For Murder'. Investigators in L.A look into a cluster of mysterious overdose deaths of young men in their 20's and discover a Doctor who uses her prescription pad to line her pockets and kill her patients.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Killer
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Bound To Kill'. A serial killer taunted Witchita, Kansas for decades with brazen letters taking credit for his kills. At the introduction of the computer era, the killer accidentally leaves behind a digital clue.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Killer
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Keys To A Killer'. Louisiana is terrorised by multiple serial killers. The small-town PD of Zachary discover the key to solving their cases when a pattern emerges with personal items missing from each local victim.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - The I-40 Killer'. A killer is murdering and mutilating young women along the Route 40 corridor in Delaware. But when investigators set up an undercover operation, the hunter soon becomes the hunted.

programme.title: License To Kill
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Prescription For Murder'. Investigators in L.A look into a cluster of mysterious overdose deaths of young men in their 20's and discover a Doctor who uses her prescription pad to line her pockets and kill her patients.

programme.title: New Scotland Yard Files
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Murder Of Alice Gross'. When detective Carl Mehta got assigned to investigate the disappearance of teenager Alice, everyone feared the worst. The largest search operation in years was launched.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Bullets On Bourbon Street'. A beautiful young bartender is swept off her feet by a charismatic up-and-coming rapper. But when a night out takes a violent turn, she sacrifices everything to protect him.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E19 - Blood Is Thicker Than Water'. After divorce, a single mother didn't expect to find love again, but a charming stranger wins her heart. Desperate to keep his love, she'd do anything to prove her loyalty.

programme.title: Inside The Mind Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Israel Keyes'. The case of Israel Keyes, who admitted to being a rapist, arsonist, burglar, bank robber and serial killer. Keyes saw the U.S as a hunting ground for killing and other criminal activities.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S20/E7 - Mystery Of Christmas'. In a change from the norm, correspondent Maureen Maher looks at the story of the birth of Jesus. Is what the Bible says true? Where was Jesus born? When? How? And why?

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: 'S13/E7 - Charlene Childers & Timothy Dean'. A loving couple are gunned down outside their home, setting in motion a cross-country investigation to track down an unlikely killer and a motive for revenge.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples
programme.desc: 'S13/E8 - Kemia Hassel & Jeremy Cuellar'. When a respected soldier is murdered on New Year's Eve, the quest for the truth reveals a deadly plot driven by temptation and obsession.

programme.title: The Mark Of A Serial Killer
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - The I-95 Killer'. After multiple men are found murdered, investigators determine that each victim was last seen with a handsome stranger they met in a bar. Police ask the public for help in tracking down the killer.

programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - The Murder Of Michael Menson'. When police found a man on fire, they assumed he did that to himself. His family campaigned for justice for two years and New Scotland Yard re-investigated the case.

programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - By Any Means Necessary'. When her father passes away, a young woman finds solace in a new man. But when he ropes her into one of his criminal schemes, she finds herself in the midst of a blood bath.

programme.title: Buddhism And The Art Of Imagining
programme.desc: We focus on the role of the imagination in Buddhist practice. Rather than thinking of meditation as a technique for solving the problem of suffering and the dharma as a science of the mind.

programme.title: Cape Gospel Vibes
programme.desc: We showcase gospel music from the community.

programme.desc: 'S1/E22'. The dinos have a falling out. After Archie saves Tiny, the little dino must repay the favour and honour the Triceratops Code.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E23'. When Rugo tries to collect all of the coconuts in Cretacia, Bill sets out to get them back! Tiny and Totor discover they have a lot in common.

programme.desc: 'S2/E27 - Big Baby, The Perfect Anniversary'. Henry helps Estelle stop being jealous of her baby brother. Henry turns the house into a romantic restaurant for Momma and Daddo's anniversary dinner.

programme.desc: 'S1/E26 - Once Upon A Roar'. Momma reads Henry the story of a magical bird who loses a special feather. Henry and Momma undertake a quest to return the feather, but is their adventure real or just a dream?

programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Honey Bee Boogie Woogie/ Willow in the Wild'. The Squad needs to find a honey bee who disappeared from her colony. When a mute beaver needs the Chicken Squad's help, Little Boo struggles to embrace a new way of communicating.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Spy Game'. Spy Game: A game in the park goes haywire when Bingo stops playing. Now Bluey must win her back.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Takeaway'. Five minutes feels like an eternity as Dad and the kids wait for their takeaway order.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Butterflies'. Playing Butterflies in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Yoga Ball'. When horsing around with Dad goes too far, Bingo learns about finding her big girl voice.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - The Doctor'. Honey's trip to see Dr. Bingo keeps getting interrupted by other, more exciting patients.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - The Claw'. Mum and Dad create their own Magic Claw machine at home, but can Bluey win the big prize?

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Blue Mountains'. In the park, the Heeler family play a game of hand puppets and go on an epic adventure.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Web Beard's Treasure / Washed Away'. Doc Ock tricks our heroes into getting treasure for her. Spidey and Ms. Marvel go down into the sewer tunnels to save TRACE-E, but they discover the Green Goblin is down there!

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E126 - Trick or Treat/ Trick or Treat Part 2'. Orticia gets carried away by tricking, not treating - resulting in mild Halloween horror.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Pepper Power/ Flickerwing Butterflies'. Pepper's boundless strength threatens to ruin Eureka's invention. Eureka and Roxy take a mother-daughter road trip to see the hatching of the flickerwing butterflies.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Spidey Team'. Bootsie gets lost at the Cat Show and Doc Ock turns her into a super-sized, monster kitty! During the concert, Doc Ock steals the drumset and uses it to hypnotize the entire audience!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E93 - Dunny'. Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' (toilet), because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E94 - Duck Cake'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys. But nothing can tempt her to clean up, until Dad drops the cake.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E97 - Octopus'. When Chloe tries to teach her dad to improvise and play Bluey's game of Octopus at home, he finds it hard to understand, until they realise they can play it their own way.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E98 - Baby Race'. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first!

programme.title: Firebuds

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Unforgettable Unbirthday / Picnic for One'. When Princess Rosa's birthday cake goes wrong, Alice surprises her with an Unbirthday Cake! The Cheshire Cat has a colossal order for Alice that she gladly completes.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E90 - Muffin Cone'. When Muffin can't stop sucking her thumb, she has to wear a cone of shame. But the cone gets in her way and she can no longer play 'sandwich shop' with Bluey and Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E93 - Dunny'. Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' (toilet), because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E94 - Duck Cake'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake, but first she must put away her toys. But nothing can tempt her to clean up, until Dad drops the cake.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E84'. Armadylan and CB compete over an exclusive Master Fang comic thinking it contains a hero secret. Armadylan loses the PJs' special jet to Night Ninja.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Try Again Tart / Pie Pressure'. When Hattie wins the Queen's tastiest tart contest, he needs to recreate his dish! Fergie cuts corners to help Alice meet deadlines, but his pies turn into a pie-tastrophy!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S4/E90 - Cupcake's Birthday/ Dog Was Derby'. When the plans for Cupcake's birthday go awry, Rufus suggests that they find the perfect gift for her instead. Bob has too much to do at Playcare, so the pups gear up to help!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals
programme.desc: 'S4/E91 - New Year, New Bob'. Bob and the Pugs head to the baseball Hall of Fame! Bingo and Rolly throw a National Bob Day to make Bob feel special!

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E36'. When Rocky is unhappy with his present from Tiny, he gets rid of it. Bill plans a quiet dinner party but ends up going off to be alone.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E50 - Bill's Nose Knows/ Big Brother, Big Sister'. Bill is known for having the best sniffer in town. When Tiny's little sister comes along, Trey spends a great deal of time playing with her...and not much time with Tiny.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E33'. The four little dinos want to give Ayati presents for her 200th birthday! Giganto finds a new 'Big Guy' to play with.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - The Big Mean Green/How Giganto Got His Roar'. When everyone blames Giganto for damaging the lake, the Dinos try to prove his innocence. Rocky wants to roar like Giganto, so he sets out to capture the beast's roar in a coconut.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E28 - I Heart Giganto/ Guardians of the Herds'. Tiny gets Giganto to join her and her besties in activities together to show how much they care. Trey and Hegen start a dino protection service, Guardians of the Herds!

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Roddy the Hero'. Henry helps Summer make a film to represent their roarsome family. Henry helps at the Cafe when Signor Roartonio's assistant is ill on Monster Pizza Day.

programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - Is A Fella Isabella?/ Dudes' Day Off With Daddo'. Henry's friend Roddy rips Summer's autographed pic of pop diva Isabella forcing him to replace it. Henry stays home to be with Daddo, who's sick.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E36'. Who will win the school science fair - Cobby's toast-a-rrific invention or Hildy's doughnut volcano? Henry and Denzel fall out, so Cobby builds him a robot friend.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E37 - The Grr Cloud, Monster Momma's Day'. When Henry has a bad day a Grr Cloud appears over his head. Henry finds the perfect Monster Mama's Day present - a fluffy mini-monster pet.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E24'. Mazu and Rocky must work together to save Tiny and Bill from Terminonator. Bill and Marsh are separated from their friends in a storm and must face their fears to get home.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster

programme.title: My Mother's Murder
programme.desc: With the help of her friends, a young woman must prove her innocence and find the real murderer, following the death of her mother in the home they both live in.

programme.title: The Debt
programme.desc: A former Mossad agent who endeavors to capture and bring to trial a notorious Nazi war criminal. 30 years later, a man claiming to be the doctor comes back to haunt them.

programme.title: Entertainment Set
programme.desc: Entertainment highlights, news and reviews.

programme.title: A Man For Every Month
programme.desc: An introverted writer has to go out on a date with a different man every month in order to write an article for her company's 'Man for Every Month' blog.

programme.title: Little Red Wagon
programme.desc: With nothing more than a blazing spirit of philanthropy and his beat-up red wagon, Zach sets out to help the homeless children after the wake of Hurricane Charley.

programme.title: Nontransferable
programme.desc: When a woman is stuck with vacation reservations in her ex-boyfriend's name, her two best friends advise her to go with another guy if she can't change the tickets.

programme.title: Man Of The Year
programme.desc: A comedian with his own TV show decides to run for presidency, to his and a lot of people's surprise, he actually becomes elected to be president.

programme.title: Starsky & Hutch
programme.desc: A parody of the popular 1970s television series. Join uptight David Starsky and laid-back Ken 'Hutch' Hutchinson as they're paired for the first time as undercover cops.

programme.title: Full Of It
programme.desc: A teenage boy (Ryan Pinkston) tells lies to fit in at school with the popular kids, but he winds up having to live out the lies he told.

programme.title: To Wong Foo, Thanks For Everything!...
programme.desc: 'To Wong Foo, Thanks For Everything! Julie Newmar'. Three drag queens sashay into the hearts of some small-town citizens when their car breaks down en route to Hollywood.

programme.title: Chocolate City
programme.desc: Life for a struggling college student changes in an instant when he meets the owner of a male strip club who convinces him to give amateur night a whirl.

programme.title: Sweetheart Con
programme.desc: Heartbroken over her parents' breakup and recovering from a car accident, a teenager becomes increasingly suspicious of her mother's charming new boyfriend.

programme.title: Sunshine Cleaning
programme.desc: A single mom hears about the lucrative field of crime-scene clean-ups and pours all her remaining money into starting her new business with the help of her squeamish sister.

programme.title: Instaglamour
programme.desc: 'S3/E67 of 104'. Explore the entertainment industry and the lives of its biggest stars through the lens of social media. The freshest news, the hottest photos, trivia and much more.

programme.title: Entertainment Set
programme.desc: Entertainment highlights, news and reviews.

programme.title: The Secret Laughter Of Women
programme.desc: Nimi leads a peaceful life in a female dominated Nigerian community - until the arrival of author Matthew. Unmarried with a young son, Nimi's status is frowned upon.

programme.title: The Killer Downstairs
programme.desc: A woman finds her life in a turmoil when the man she rents her basement suite to becomes obsessed with her and more people in her life begin disappearing.

programme.title: Imagine That
programme.desc: When a successful finance executive has a crisis of confidence and his career goes downhill, he finds the solution to all his problems in his daughter's imaginary world.

programme.title: To Wong Foo, Thanks For Everything!...
programme.desc: 'To Wong Foo, Thanks For Everything! Julie Newmar'. Three drag queens sashay into the hearts of some small-town citizens when their car breaks down en route to Hollywood.

programme.title: Random Encounters
programme.desc: What seems to be a chance encounter at a coffee shop leads to a full-fledged romance, but the couple must fight for their relationship to survive the showbizz.

programme.title: Crooked Arrows
programme.desc: A multiracial Native American connects with his proud heritage by coaching his reservation's scrappy lacrosse team to the state finals.

programme.title: Full Of It
programme.desc: A teenage boy (Ryan Pinkston) tells lies to fit in at school with the popular kids, but he winds up having to live out the lies he told.

programme.title: Zoom
programme.desc: An out-of-shape former superhero who has lost his powers is reluctantly called back into action to turn a rag-tag group of kids into a new generation of super heroes to save the world.

programme.title: 28 Days
programme.desc: A jaded party girl enters a month of court-ordered rehab after drunkenly wrecking a limousine.

programme.title: Humpday
programme.desc: The topic of male bonding is taken to new extremes in this comedy about two best friends who make an unusual pact that both may soon come to regret.

programme.title: Nora Roberts' Northern Lights
programme.desc: Nate Burns accepts a job as chief of police in Lunacy, Alaska, hoping to to get away from the traumatic death of his partner back in Baltimore.

programme.title: Rage Of Honor
programme.desc: When Shiro's partner is murdered, the chief insists that he let the case drop. While in Singapore he discovers that the killers are trying to steal a top-secret government disk.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: The mobsters use a theme park as a front for their money-counterfeiting operation, and defeats the evil scheme while turning the park upside down.

programme.title: Beast Of Burden
programme.desc: From the cockpit of his aircraft, a drug-smuggling pilot agrees to help the DEA take down a cartel in return for getting his wife crucial medical treatment.

programme.title: Gabby Douglas Story
programme.desc: This inspiring biographical film tells the story of the first African-American to be named Individual All-Around Champion in artistic gymnastics at the Olympic Games.

programme.title: Misfire
programme.desc: A disgraced DEA agent squares off against a drug cartel in an effort to clear his brother of murder charges.

programme.title: Street Kings
programme.desc: When evidence implicates a veteran cop in the execution of a fellow officer, he is forced to go up against the cop culture he's been a part of for his entire career.

programme.title: Pain And Gain
programme.desc: Michael Bay (Transformers) directs Mark Wahlberg in this violent crime-drama, loosely based on a true story about a group of bodybuilders who extort money from a wealthy businessman.

programme.title: Back In The Day
programme.desc: After his mother dies and his alcoholic father runs out of town, a young man is helped by the mob to realise his dream of becoming a professional boxer.

programme.title: Rage Of Honor
programme.desc: When Shiro's partner is murdered, the chief insists that he let the case drop. While in Singapore he discovers that the killers are trying to steal a top-secret government disk.

programme.title: Entertainment Set
programme.desc: Entertainment highlights, news and reviews.

programme.title: The Heavy
programme.desc: The sibling rivalry between two brothers comes to a head when one is given a chance to take revenge on the other.

programme.title: Films And Stars
programme.desc: 'S3/E60 of 104'. Films and Stars offers something for everyone by putting you right into the heart of Hollywood. Its your inside guide to the movies bringing Hollywood alive on the small screne.

programme.title: Red Sky
programme.desc: Disgraced top-gun fighter pilot Butch Masters leads a rogue squad in recovery of a weapon of mass destruction.

programme.title: Blood Father
programme.desc: An ex-con reunites with his estranged wayward 16-year old daughter to protect her from drug dealers who are trying to kill her.

programme.title: Making The Movies
programme.desc: 'S1/E35 of 104'. This is a Movie magazine for anyone with an interest in knowing how movies are made! Exclusive background stories, on and off set! Making the Movies tells you all there is to know about how films come to life.

programme.title: Home Invasion
programme.desc: When her boyfriend is killed in a home invasion gone awry, a vengeful vixen befriends the traumatised woman who shot him in an attempt to seek bitter revenge.

programme.title: Shaolin Soccer
programme.desc: A soccer coach and Shaolin kung-fu devotee assemble a squad of former Shaolin brothers inspired by the big-money prize in a national soccer competition.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: South Africa's own Sharlto Copley stars alongside Liam Neeson in a remake of the beloved 1980s classic. After being framed, a team of ex-military men try to clear their names.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: A decade since Jason Bourne walked away from the agency that trained him to become a deadly weapon, he finds himself drawn back to the sinister network.

programme.title: Blood Father
programme.desc: An ex-con reunites with his estranged wayward 16-year old daughter to protect her from drug dealers who are trying to kill her.

programme.title: Dead Again In Tombstone
programme.desc: After saving himself from an eternity in Hell, Guerrero continues to roam the Wild West collecting bounties on behalf of Lucifer.

programme.title: Did You Know?
programme.desc: 'S8 - Solving Crime With the Latest Technology'. Technology helps the police solve crime, but training people and animals can have amazing crime-solving results too.

programme.title: Did You Know?
programme.desc: 'S8 - Secrets of Skin'. Our skin is an extraordinary organ that protects us every day. Sometimes its reactions are a bit extreme.

programme.title: Innovation
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Fresh Fish Supper'. Aquaculture used to rely on large fish eating the remains of small ones, but the ocean's resources are under pressure. Is there another way?

programme.title: The Pet Rescuers
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Mono-Eyed Cat'. Megan worries about the medical condition of the mono-eyed cat that's stolen her heart. And Gabby's reunited with a former foster friend.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Caterpillar'. The carnivorous caterpillars of Hawaii have evolved to eat flies. They've got grabbing arms and sharp jaws.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Nazca Booby'. On the Galapagos Islands, the Nazca booby lays its eggs on the ground. After the chicks have hatched, only the stronger one survives.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Are You Drinking Enough Water?'. The doctors check their urine and investigate snake venom. At the hospital, there's a black eye and a head injury.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Red Blood And Old Bones'. The doctors investigate how oxygen works in the blood. Dr Xand checks out diseased bones and organs, and Dr Chris treats an emergency.

programme.title: Matilda and the Ramsay Bunch
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - The Concert'. Matilda and her family find out what it takes to become a rock star. Matilda cooks for the band 'The Vamps' and tries playing drums.

programme.title: Matilda and the Ramsay Bunch
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - The Ramsay Pirates'. Matilda and her family go the seaside at Cornwall in England and set sail on a homemade raft. Matilda cooks up a feast of local food.

programme.title: Matilda and the Ramsay Bunch
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - The Beach Race'. Matilda and her family learn how to drive sail-powered blowcarts and race them on the beach. Matilda prepares some seaside-themed recipes.

programme.title: Do You Know?
programme.desc: 'S4/E20 - Speaker and Colour'. Maddie learns how a speaker works and discovers how colours in paint and light are made.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Pearlfish'. Perhaps Planet Earth should be called Planet Wetness, since it's mostly covered in water! This water contains some fascinating creatures.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Stalk-Eyed Flies'. The stalk-eyed fly blows air bubbles up inside its head and along the eyestalks - like blowing up the world's weirdest balloon.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Sloth Moths'. For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites to algae to a colony of sloth moths.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Bombardier Beetles'. The bombardier beetle has evolved a special way to avoid being eaten. It sprays its enemies with a mix of chemicals and boiling water.

programme.title: Do You Know?
programme.desc: 'S4/E21 - Maddie the Zoo and You - Why Do We Eat?'. Maddie learns why we eat and finds out how we keep our teeth clean.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Parental Bug'. It's not always happy families in the wild. Some creatures have very strange parenting skills.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Giant Leech'. The giant Bornean leech can grow up to half a metre long. It likes eating worms, which it slurps like spaghetti.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Rocket Jaw: Rescue of the Reef'. The Wild Kratts discover that Zach and Donita have sent robotic Parrotfish to collect coral for jewellery.

programme.title: That's Cool
programme.desc: 'S1/E56 - Nails Don't All Grow at the Same Rate!'. Find out how fingernails grow and why they grow faster on the hand you use most.

programme.title: Jolly Jesters

programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - The Wrinkly Skin Bath'. Dr Chris and Dr Xand try to find out why skin goes wrinkly in the bath. Dr Chris meets a patient taking part in amazing heart research.

programme.title: How To Do Stuff Good
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Abishek's Cool Cloud Lamp'. How to make the ultimate prank pops, create your own cloud lamp, and wrap your presents sustainably.

programme.title: How To Do Stuff Good
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Christian's Bowls You Can Eat'. How to trap mosquitoes, decorate with pompoms and make bowls you can eat.

programme.title: How To Do Stuff Good
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Molly's Edible Echidnas'. How to make a delicious potato animal, a freaky bouncy egg, and prank your thirsty friends with a leaky bottle.

programme.title: Citizen Code
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Smart Robots'. Already, robots can explore a volcano, make cars, put out fires and go to Mars! They can even make smart decisions on their own.

programme.title: Citizen Code
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Design Imagination'. Designers help change happen by imagining ways new technology can be used to make life easier.

programme.title: Know It All
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - How Did the Leopard Get its Spots?'. Mathematician and cryptographer Alan Turing came up with a chemical theory of morphogenesis to explain why leopards have spots.

programme.title: Know It All
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Are Bees Colour Blind?'. Despite having five eyes, bees can't see red. They can, however, see ultraviolet, which is invisible to us.

programme.title: Know It All
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Are Hot Springs Magical?'. The Grand Prismatic Spring of Yellowstone National Park in the USA is a rainbow coloured hot spring. Cyanobacteria create these colours.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?
programme.desc: 'S2/E17 - Penguin Chick Bot'. Host Alie Ward presents an innovative Surf Park, inflatable fish that swim through the air, 3D printed statues and a penguin chick bot.

programme.title: A Week to Beat the World
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Japan Day 2'. The boys' team are in Japan, learning how to Sumo wrestle. Today, this involves trying to catch fish by hand!

programme.title: Jolly Jesters
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Tournaments'. After becoming a knight against his better judgement, Howler takes us on a wild joust.

programme.title: Do You Know?
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Cereal Potato Harvester'. Maddie learns how a potato harvester works on a farm, and she visits a cereal factory to see how wheat biscuits are made.

programme.title: Do You Know?
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 - Bowling Ally and Ribbon'. Maddie visits a bowling alley to find out how it works, and we learn how ribbon is made.

programme.title: When I Grow Up
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Entomologist'. Mikaela goes to the Royal Ontario Museum to meet Antonia - an entomologist. Her job is to study insects and help people learn about them.

programme.title: Search it Up!
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - I've Forgotten My Password... Again!'. Learn about creating good usernames and passwords.

programme.title: Marvellous Makes
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Blazing Blast Rocket'. Shoot for the moon and make a sizzling spaceship. Don't worry, it's not rocket science.

programme.title: Matilda and the Ramsay Bunch
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - The LA Dogs'. Matilda and her family are missing their dogs. They visit a real life dog hotel, and afterwards, she creates a lunch with a dog theme.

programme.title: Jolly Jesters
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Troubadours and Minstrels'. In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Famous musician Howler enjoys huge success.

programme.title: Go Green with the Grimwades
programme.desc: 'S2/E1'. The Grimwades decide to repair Mommy's bike. The family agrees that not only is cycling a green way to travel, but it's great fun too.

programme.title: Go Green with the Grimwades
programme.desc: 'S2/E2'. The Grimwades decide to reuse the wind. You could also go green by reusing cardboard tubes and old material to make windsocks of your own.

programme.title: The Pet Rescuers
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - A Second Chance'. The new day brings a new arrival - Charlie - an underweight kitten. Meanwhile, Caitlin is treating an abused poodle with a pitiful past.

programme.title: Animal Embassy
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Limp Penguin'. Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems.

programme.title: Know It All
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - What's Over the Rainbow?'. Rainbows are circular, but from the ground we can only see the upper arch.

programme.title: Know It All
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - What's so Great About Mould?'. Thanks to mould we have penicillin, an antibiotic which saved countless lives since it was discovered by Alexander Fleming.

programme.title: Xploration DIY SCI
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Electricity'. Steve Spangler does fun experiments based on the science of electricity.

programme.title: 1 Minute in a Museum
programme.desc: 'S3/E20 - Rondo Depicting a Lion Attacking a Bull'. Rafael, Mona and Nabi look at a rondo, a circular shaped object decorated with a picture of a lion attacking a bull.

programme.title: Science Max
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Chemistry'. The 'vinegar and baking soda volcano' needs a more reactive overhaul. Plus, Phil coats his outfit in hydrophobic spray and gets in the pool.

programme.title: Animal Anarchists
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Cheese Mites'. Cheese mites are now largely regarded as a pest. But some artisan cheeses still use them, and their earthy flavour is enjoyed by many.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 - The Immunity Army'. Dr Chris and Dr Xand reveal the amazing germ-fighters that make up your immune system, and find out how to clean a baby's incubator.

programme.title: Operation Ouch!
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - Seeing From Inside'. The doctors find out why we burp and find out what it takes to be a good ambulance driver. Dr Xand visits the Radiology department.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Budding Ideas'. Danni uncovers some of the different ways plants and fungi are inspiring new inventions and technologies.

programme.title: Citizen Code
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Super Speedy Algorithms'. An algorithm is a set of rules for calculations or searches, especially by a computer. A computer algorithm is very quick.

programme.title: Futuris
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Smart Animal Farm'. Can algorithms improve the wellbeing of pigs? Scientists have developed a sophisticated platform to answer that question.

programme.title: Futuris
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - The Travelling Greenhouse'. Scientists are developing a portable greenhouse designed to pre-cultivate forest regeneration plants in a zero-impact way.

programme.title: Magic Numbers: Hannah Fry's...

programme.title: The Word Of God In Our Heart
programme.desc: In this message, Prophet T.B. Joshua noted the importance of allowing God's Word in the midst of our heart. Christianity lies in the heart and the Word of God in our heart is our contact with Him.

programme.title: Faith Is A Light Switch
programme.desc: Faith is the channel through which the anointing flows. We must ask for the anointing to be healed, delivered and blessed as children of God.

programme.title: Testimony Time
programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: Another Ministry: Alabarago
programme.desc: Travel with the Emmanuel TV team to Alabarago, Nigeria to bring food to the hungry, water to the thirsty and hope to those in despair.

programme.title: A Time Of Prayer
programme.desc: Position yourself to receive, as you pray along with TB Joshua, in this special time of prayer.

programme.title: Standard For Life
programme.desc: Christ and His Word are inseparable! Get connected to God's Word and God's Spirit as you listen to this life transforming message live and direct from The SCOAN.

programme.title: Another Ministry: Albania
programme.desc: As citizens around the world struggle to cope with the economic backlash amidst the lockdown over Coronavirus, Emmanuel TV partners reach out to needy communities.

programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.desc: As people worldwide struggle to cope with the economic repercussions of the lockdown over the Coronavirus outbreak, Emmanuel TV team reaches out to less privileged communities in the USA with financial support.

programme.title: Friends And Heroes
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Sweet Freedom'. Macky and the gang plan to rescue some slaves forced to work in the Roman granaries. We learn the importance of taking a stand and choosing the right path.

programme.title: Standard For Life
programme.desc: Christ and His Word are inseparable! Get connected to God's Word and God's Spirit as you listen to this life transforming message live and direct from The SCOAN.

programme.title: Another Ministry: Abuja
programme.desc: Love looks around to see those who are in need. Due to the lockdown sparked off by Coronavirus, Emmanuel TV partners in Abuja, Nigeria, reach out to some deprived communities to provide food items and financial support. Be inspired.

programme.title: A Discouraged Servant
programme.desc: Are you taking a step back during crises? No matter what you are going through, let your situation produce a sense of dependence on God. This message by T.B. Joshua will teach you that the more your situation, the more you see God.

programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.desc: Are you taking a step back during crises? No matter what you are going through, let your situation produce a sense of dependence on God. This message by T.B. Joshua will teach you that the more your situation, the more you see God.

programme.title: Where Is Your Faith?
programme.desc: Around the world today, millions of prayers are prayed with almost no faith. See yourself clearly in this message as you can be a man of prayer but perhaps not a man of faith.

programme.title: Testimony Time
programme.desc: Listen to some powerful testimonies of the goodness of God that will build your faith and enjoy a time of prayer with Prophet TB Joshua.

programme.title: Another Ministry: Ecuador
programme.desc: T.B Joshua and the Emmanuel TV reach out in love, donating a school and facilities to the Chachi people of the remote San Salvador community in Ecuador after an earthquake damaged the main school for their community.

programme.title: Friends And Heroes
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Lost in Alexandria'. Little Leah goes missing in the back streets of the city and is tricked into enslavement in a sweatshop run by Toadie. With help from Portia, Macky works to foil the scheme.

programme.title: Another Ministry: Ghana
programme.desc: They are in want so that we may be their benefactor. The Emmanuel TV Team spends quality time visiting orphanages in Ghana, sharing the love of God through gifts, financial support and encouraging words.

programme.title: Pay Attention To God
programme.desc: There is no one on this earth without limitation. Limitation makes our Christian life, our journey more valuable and gives us more reason to pay attention to God. Get a rightful focus as you listen to Prophet T.B. Joshua's message.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Himalayas'. Sue travels from the sacred summit of Shivling, source of the Ganges, to the beautiful mountain town of Rishikesh. Along the way, she meets Hindu holy men known as sadhus.

programme.title: Scottish Islands with Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Inner Hebrides'. Ben Fogle explores the ancient sea roads of the Inner Hebrides. He visits Iona, the cradle of Christianity, and learns how Columba's legacy inspires people today.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Two Feet and a Heartbeat'. While Becky Brodrick and her husband are busy building an exercise enclosure for their working dogs, Pierre-Yves and Kim need to collect berries and fish for a hgh-energy food boost during the winter.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Guatemala'. Ben ventures deep into the jungles of Guatemala, once home to an ancient Mayan civilisation but also the 'new life' of Mike Merrill, a former sound engineer from Texas.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Tesla'. A behind-the-scenes look at the Tesla automotive manufacturing facility, where the world's strongest robots produce 2000 cars a week.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Guatemala'. Ben ventures deep into the jungles of Guatemala, once home to an ancient Mayan civilisation but also the 'new life' of Mike Merrill, a former sound engineer from Texas.

programme.title: Deadly Predators
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Sharks'. Steve uncovers the secrets of sharks, the world's most infamous predators. He heads out into the Atlantic Ocean to dive with blue sharks, a beautiful but deadly species.

programme.title: How To Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: 'S5/E2'. Drag queens Jordan and Thomas have one week to drop a dress size, while best friends Earl and Vince go on six week faith-based diets. And mums Maria and Jules want to lose weight within three months.

programme.title: How To Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: 'S5/E4'. Colleagues Sheila and Syrika have 1 week to diet ahead of a party. Partners Greg and Nath go on 6-week diets to slim before Lincoln Pride. Pals Becci and Cassie have 4 months to diet before a wedding.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The Himalayas'. Sue travels from the sacred summit of Shivling, source of the Ganges, to the beautiful mountain town of Rishikesh. Along the way, she meets Hindu holy men known as sadhus.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Taking Chances'. Andy Bassich and Denise Becker attempt a harvest that isn't usually available this time of year. Iriqtaiq Hailstone sets out to help her sisters and to teach her son a native skill.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Littoral Combat Ships'. The US Navy's fastest combat ships are capable of a turn of speed only possible due to a revolutionary water propulsion system and the chance discovery of a brand new alloy.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Georgia, USA'. Adventurer Ben Fogle journeys to the swamplands of Georgia to live with Colbert, a former city fat cat-turned-jungle Tarzan.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E4 - The Other Side'. Ricko DeWilde travels to cursed lands to finally lay his brother's spirit to rest. Sue Aikens ventures into the tundra to map the shifting landscape.

programme.title: Living Wild: How to Change Your Life
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. In rural Nottinghamshire, Sophie meets a shepherd who sleeps outdoors and raises rare sheep. There's also paragliding over the Sussex Downs and crop farming in Wales.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E11'. In the Philippines, the Taal volcano violently erupts, blasting ash and spewing debris over nearby towns and villages. In Queensland, Australia, a freak hail storm unleashes a destructive assault on residents.

programme.title: Puerto Rico: Island Of Enchantment
programme.desc: A team of conservation champions are trying to save precious species which live in Puerto Rico. Find out how parrots, manatees, and turtles are making a comeback.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Gangetic Plain'. The Gangetic Plain is where the ancient and modern collide - from the sacred city of Varanasi to Patna, a city fast becoming India's Silicon Valley.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Tesla'. A behind-the-scenes look at the Tesla automotive manufacturing facility, where the world's strongest robots produce 2000 cars a week.

programme.title: Spectacular Earth
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Volcano'. Volcan del Fuego in Guatemala is one of the most 'explosive' volcanoes of them all. To reveal what's happening within the volcano, visit the 'new' Island of Surtsey.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 - Missouri'. Ben travels to the Ozark Plateau in Missouri to meet Bo Brown, a wilderness expert who teaches Stone Age skills to modern day man. Ben learns how to make a spear and prepare foods like squirrels and insects.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Snowbound'. Becky makes a last-ditch effort to harvest a Muskox, Kim and Pierre must upgrade their shelter, desperate for a successful fur season, Bentley works his trapline, and caught in a deep-freeze.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Airlander 10'. Revealing the secret behind the construction of Airlander 10, the world's largest aircraft which combines elements of planes, helicopters and airships and is able to stay airborne for five days.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Gangetic Plain'. The Gangetic Plain is where the ancient and modern collide - from the sacred city of Varanasi to Patna, a city fast becoming India's Silicon Valley.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Gangetic Plain'. The Gangetic Plain is where the ancient and modern collide - from the sacred city of Varanasi to Patna, a city fast becoming India's Silicon Valley.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E12'. In Texas and Mexico, the first Atlantic hurricane of the season makes landfall, creating dangerous flooding and widespread destruction. A tornado outbreak unleashes carnage on Oklahoma, Texas and Louisiana.

programme.title: Spectacular Earth
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Volcano'. Volcan del Fuego in Guatemala is one of the most 'explosive' volcanoes of them all. To reveal what's happening within the volcano, visit the 'new' Island of Surtsey.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Airlander 10'. Revealing the secret behind the construction of Airlander 10, the world's largest aircraft which combines elements of planes, helicopters and airships and is able to stay airborne for five days.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 - Missouri'. Ben travels to the Ozark Plateau in Missouri to meet Bo Brown, a wilderness expert who teaches Stone Age skills to modern day man. Ben learns how to make a spear and prepare foods like squirrels and insects.

programme.title: Deadly Predators
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Predator Power'. Steve goes in search of some of the most powerful predators on the planet. At historic Warwick Castle, we meet the stellar sea eagle, the world's heaviest eagle.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Discover how engineers built Zaha Hadid's Antwerp Port House, find out how 432 Park Avenue New York was built and marvel at Kengo Kuma's Victoria & Albert Museum in Dundee, Scotland.

programme.title: How Did They Build That?
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. In Singapore, The Pinnacle at Duxton is a stunning seven tower, 50 story, apartment complex. And in Brighton the i360 forced engineers to think outside the box.

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Gangetic Plain'. The Gangetic Plain is where the ancient and modern collide - from the sacred city of Varanasi to Patna, a city fast becoming India's Silicon Valley.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Georgia, USA'. Adventurer Ben Fogle journeys to the swamplands of Georgia to live with Colbert, a former city fat cat-turned-jungle Tarzan.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S8/E4 - The Other Side'. Ricko DeWilde travels to cursed lands to finally lay his brother's spirit to rest. Sue Aikens ventures into the tundra to map the shifting landscape.

programme.title: Living Wild: How to Change Your Life
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. In rural Nottinghamshire, Sophie meets a shepherd who sleeps outdoors and raises rare sheep. There's also paragliding over the Sussex Downs and crop farming in Wales.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Tesla'. A behind-the-scenes look at the Tesla automotive manufacturing facility, where the world's strongest robots produce 2000 cars a week.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
Living Wild: How to Change Your Life
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Sophie heads for coastal Cornwall and Devon woodlands. She also goes foraging on a remote Scottish island and visits a floating salon in Cheshire.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Martin explores French Polynesia through French baguettes and coral wine, and on a Polynesian outrigger canoe. He swims with sharks, investigates Marlon Brando's wildlife programme.

programme.title: Attenborough's Wonder Of Song
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Episode 1'. Sir David Attenborough tunes in to the remarkable sounds of the natural world, an open-air festival of songs of procreation and survival. But will they soon be heard no more?

programme.title: The Ganges With Sue Perkins
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Delta'. Sue visits the beautiful mangroves of the Sundarbans, home of the Bengal tiger, and meets the villagers who live in fear of an attack.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Airlander 10'. Revealing the secret behind the construction of Airlander 10, the world's largest aircraft which combines elements of planes, helicopters and airships and is able to stay airborne for five days.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Martin climbs an active volcano in Vanuatu, and in Tonga meets a third gender leiti and a princess. In Fiji he visits a tribe tricked out of their homeland by a British mining company.

programme.title: Cornwall With Simon Reeve
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Simon Reeve travels through glorious Cornwall during a summer like no other, as the county emerges from lockdown and businesses are in a race to survive.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - Cambodia'. Ben Fogle travels to Cambodia to live with a fellow Brit who is raising his own castaway tribe on a tropical island.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Record Breaking Rollercoaster'. The world's tallest roller coaster is in Los Angeles' Six Flags Amusement Park, which was inspired by scenic railways and steam catapults on aircraft carriers.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race
programme.desc: 'S15/E1 - Laguna Beach Heat'. The battle begins as Tyler Florence welcomes nine food trucks to Laguna Beach, CA. One team with stellar sales gets less than stellar reviews.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Stew Or Get Off The Lot'. The pressure is on as the four chefs try to prepare perfect paninis. Plus, there's no time to go low and slow to concoct savoury stews.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E7 - Cosmopolitan Comfort'. This trip, Guy Fieri tucks into cosmopolitan comfort food. He samples corned beef and cabbage, Ethiopian specialties, and lamb poutine-loaded hot dogs!

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E6 - Father Cooks Best'. Three dads and their kids pit their family recipes against each other hoping to win $20,000. This family feast begins with a greatest grilled dinner challenge.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Cookie Pairings'. Five fantastic cookie makers create marvellous cookie mug toppers, decadent cookie dunkers and edible cookie platters for a chance to win $10,000.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Thanksgiving Genius'. The seven remaining bakers must create a Thanksgiving dessert using a mystery canned fruit. Then they make a new dish by combining two traditional desserts.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S48/E2 - Grudge Match: Battle 2'. Four judges step behind the stove for an intense competition. In the appetiser basket, the chefs find a strange fish dish and some tiny exotic fruits.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E6 - Father Cooks Best'. Three dads and their kids pit their family recipes against each other hoping to win $20,000. This family feast begins with a greatest grilled dinner challenge.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S5/E23 - Naples'. From Brussels' delicious Belgian chocolate to Naples' famous pizza, Chef Andrew Zimmern explores the delectable and iconic foods that define a location.

programme.title: Chopped Junior
programme.desc: 'S4/E10 - Fries Wise'. The kid chefs try to make technically-excellent dishes out of ground beef and curly fries. A stuffed cookie cup provides a challenge for the dessert round.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E11 - Kid Crew Cooking'. Ree cooks dishes for her kid film crew! She serves up tasty bites such as jalapeno bacon cheeseburger mac and a decadent layered brownie skillet sundae.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E12 - Chilled Out'. Ree creates cool recipes for a very hot day! She serves up an amazing salmon niçoise Caesar salad mashup and the coolest California roll sushi bowl.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S4/E2'. Molly Yeh's family is in town to celebrate Rosh Hashana, and she makes a fabulous brunch of sweet apple butter rolls and a tender and juicy brisket and carrot hash.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S11/E4 - Napoleon's March Through Poland'. Andrew gets a taste of the culinary impact of Napoleon Bonaparte's march through Poland. He tries tripe soup and rump steak seasoned with gunpowder.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S26/E3 - A Sticky Situation'. Alex Guarnaschelli and Geoffrey Zakarian bring in two talented pastry chefs to defeat Bobby. One chef makes delicious Brazilian nut torrijas.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Cake And Ice Cream 2.0'. Duff and Valerie challenge the nine remaining kid bakers to work with the classic combination of cake and ice cream to create unique desserts.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S19/E6 - Slumping Sales In San Jose'. Robert finds The Breakfast Place in San Jose, CA, uninspired, dirty and on the brink of closing for good. Can he save the owners' business and friendship?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E8 - Burgers, Buns And Bagels'. Guy Fieri is going carb-crazy this trip! He finds a deli serving up lamb burgers and ribs. And, a Koreatown eatery makes Asian buns and a bacon-corn dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E9 - Big Food, Small Towns'. Guy Fieri visits small towns with big food! He checks out a butchery cranking out corn dogs and a 1700s inn-turned-gastropub serving a spin on disco fries.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Santa's Sweet Spot'. The bakers are challenged to make a super-sized decorated cookie for Santa. Then, to claim the $10,000, they create a 3D winter wonderland scene using cookies.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S48/E3 - Grudge Match: Battle 4'. Cooking legends face off for a chance at the $100,000 finale! In round one, the chefs must incorporate a sweet breakfast item into an appetiser.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E7 - Twin It To Win It'. Three pairs of twins team up to show that two heads are better than one when it comes to winning up to $20,000. First up, a birthday cake for dinner challenge.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S31/E2 - Spice It Up'. Ree Drummond adds variety and spice to some family favourites. She makes spicy garlic bread sloppy Joes and spicy ginger sundaes with five-spice crisps.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S10/E3 - Let's Get Cozy!'. Molly Yeh is making hearty foods to keep her family warm. They include comforting chicken and dumpling soup with decadent no knead salami bread.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S10/E2 - Practice On The Farm'. Molly Yeh makes a Midwest-Italian inspired feast. The tasty menu includes spaghetti and juicy meatballs and charred broccolini on creamy homemade ricotta.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - A New Holiday Spin'. The six remaining bakers create new takes on traditional holiday baking. Inspired by an internet baking meme, they use yellow cake mix to make anything but cake.

programme.desc: 'S50/E2 - Time Capsule: '90s Foods!'. The chefs set out to make trendy 1990s foods yummy for a new millennium. The combination of ingredients in the first basket confuses the competitors.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S52/E13'. Four champions return on a mission to become a sous-chef for a series judge. A stinky fruit and a spicy ice cream feature in the dessert round.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E9 - Big Food, Small Towns'. Guy Fieri visits small towns with big food! He checks out a butchery cranking out corn dogs and a 1700s inn-turned-gastropub serving a spin on disco fries.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games
programme.desc: 'S13/E7 - Twin It To Win It'. Three pairs of twins team up to show that two heads are better than one when it comes to winning up to $20,000. First up, a birthday cake for dinner challenge.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Santa's Sweet Spot'. The bakers are challenged to make a super-sized decorated cookie for Santa. Then, to claim the $10,000, they create a 3D winter wonderland scene using cookies.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - A New Holiday Spin'. The six remaining bakers create new takes on traditional holiday baking. Inspired by an internet baking meme, they use yellow cake mix to make anything but cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S5/E24 - Beijing'. From Brussels' delicious Belgian chocolate to Naples' famous pizza, Chef Andrew Zimmern explores the delectable and iconic foods that define a location.

programme.title: Chopped Junior
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 - Lemon Meringue Why?'. The junior chefs make a starter with wildfire lettuce and fluke. In the dessert round both remaining competitors tackle baking and ice-cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E13 - Too Tired To Cook'. Ree is on the ranch making fast and easy dishes. There's an effortless one pot clam spaghetti, caprese avocado toast, and Tex-Mex pantry gnocchi soup.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E1 - Lighter Classics'. Ree Drummond gives classic dishes a lighter spin, starting with spice-rubbed grilled cauliflower steaks and fully loaded lightened up nachos.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S4/E3 - Girl Meets Grill'. Molly Yeh fires up the outdoor grill, starting with spicy burgers with cheddar inside, homemade chili potato chips and sesame avocado salsa on the side.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Midwest Oktoberfest'. Molly Yeh decides to host an epic version of Oktoberfest. She whips up a variety of German-inspired dishes including pretzels cooked in two very different ways.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods With Andrew Zimmern
programme.desc: 'S11/E5 - Germany's Route 66'. Andrew discovers the culinary magic of Germany's Romantic Road. He dines on udder schnitzel, pancreas stew, grilled goose and Franconian bread dumplings.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S19/E7 - Big Ego, Big Trouble'. In Colorado, the chef of Momma Pearl's Cajun Kitchen is on the verge of losing his wife and his business. Can Robert help him shed his arrogant alter ego?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E10 - From Port To Port'. This trip, Guy Fieri goes from Portsmouth to Portland looking for top flavours! He checks out octopus, classic biscuits and gravy, and pork belly tacos.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E11 - Turkey-Giving'. Guy Fieri prepares for Turkey Day! In Princeton, NJ, rapper Rev. Run jumps in for crepes and a New Hampshire cafe cooks up terrific turkey meatloaf.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S47/E7 - Pickle Panic'. The chefs are thrown off by beer-battered seafood and a bizarre bouquet of pickles in the first basket. Next, the second basket contains a stinky surprise inside.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Christmas Gifts'. Five bakers are challenged to make decorated cookie toys and edible cookie boxes to fill with Christmas cookies for a chance at the $10,000 prize.

programme.desc: 'S13/E8 - Carnival Games'. Four chefs compete in carnival games to determine what they can cook with, what their budgets are and where they can shop while preparing next-level carnival food.

programme.title: Holiday Wars
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Reindeer Auditions'. In the first qualifying round, the three teams of cake and sugar artists must showcase an unlikely understudy who dreams of pulling Santa's sleigh.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Attitude Of Gratitude'. It's a holiday pantry raid as nine bakers create canned fruit desserts! Later they make Thanksgiving pies with heartfelt messages on top.

programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Rollodons'. When tar fills the cracks of the crater, the Dinotrux must find a way to herd the free-roaming Rollodons to help smooth over the sticky situation.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Ghost Bust a Move'. Ghostbust a Move When Jimmy's dad decides to move the family away from Deedstown, Casper and his friends vow to stop Mr. Bradley from selling their house.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Noddy And The Magic Paintbrush'. When Noddy accidentally crashes Car, he borrows a magic paint brush from Big Ears, but the brush malfunctions and causes havoc all over town.

programme.title: Noddy In Toyland
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Giant Jelly'. When Noddy sees the empty tray the jelly was on at the Skittles' birthday party, it gives him an idea for a game. So the Skittles' use the giant jelly tray as a slide.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Olivia Plans A Tea Party'. When Olivia's Mom gets sick, she steps up and helps plan a tea party and not just any old tea party, but a pirate tea party.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Why Elephant Has A Trunk'. Why does Elephant have a trunk? Well, you see one day Crocodile was feeling particularly snappy...

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Why Snake Has No Legs'. Why doesn't Snake have legs? Well, you see he swapped a thousand of his legs for Millipede's two eyes.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Case Of The Broken Crystal Memory Game'. All the toys are ready to start the DareDale Challenge race, which culminates in the competitors successfully completing the Crystal Memory Game in the DareDale Caves.

programme.title: Veggietales: In The House
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Laura At Bat / Pie Fight!'. Laura thinks she only has to dream she's a great athlete to be a great athlete. It's sour grapes for Madame Blueberry when she loses a baking contest.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Liam The Hero'. In order to get a ticket to a Manga convention she desperately wants, Birch agrees to write a series of Manga strips featuring Liam as a suave, cool and heroic character.

programme.title: My Life Me

programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Jason and Michelle set off a series of practical jokes on board the ship. None of which turn out to be very funny to their victims.

programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Packet Racket, The/Smack Me Down'. Turbo and Shadow go undercover to expose some shady bugs selling artificial ketchup, Turbo prepares to compete in an underground smack-talk contest.

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Deep Trouble'. Dak's lack of planning gets him, Cutter and Winger lost with Elbone in the Maze Caves, and Leyla's overthinking threatens the effort to rescue them.

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Postman Pat'S Pancake Party'. Pat delivers pancake ingredients, Sara loses her pancake and there's pancake mix all over the road. Can Pat save the annual Pancake Race?

programme.title: Postman Pat Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Postman Pat And The Runaway Remote'. Pat's Special Delivery turns out to be a lot more powerful than he thought! Pat has to race to save the town from a destructive robot.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E45 - Gone Fishing'. Raa Raa is keen to try fishing with Crocky, but keeps scaring the fish away every time he makes a noise. Crocky and the others come up with a very special fishing trip.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E46 - The Lion's Share'. Raa Raa has made a new toy and sets off to ask his friends if they can guess what it is. The animals have lots of fun together as they try to work out what the toy does.

programme.title: Little Charley Bear

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Murder On The Menu'. Two young women are executed in a burger joint but there are no witnesses. Could a helpful hooker and some revealing letters be just what detectives ordered?

programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Drunk Driving Terror'. A family try to intervene when a car swerves wildly across the road. And, a drunk driver speeds the wrong way down a highway.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: 'S2/E14 - Vicious Abductions'. A woman is out walking when two strangers suddenly jump out of a car and try to grab her dog. And, a barefoot man begs a convenience store employee for help.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Child Snatchers'. The true stories of attempted child kidnappings in broad daylight, with camera footage from the crime scene and testimony from eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Catch That Crook'. The true stories of members of the public who have collared fleeing criminals, with camera footage from the scene and testimony from eyewitnesses.

programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - The Torture Trap'. Two college football players go missing in New York. Detectives chase down leads to find a case of mistaken identity leading to a terrifying hostage crisis.

programme.title: Evil Talks: Chilling Confessions
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Dead By Dawn'. The unsolved murder of a teenage girl haunts detectives until a DNA test reopens the case decades later. The suspect is so shocking, they consult the FBI for help.

programme.title: James Patterson's Murder Is Forever
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Murder In Paradise'. In 1990, woman is fatally shot inside her cabin in California. As police begin to unravel the mystery, an unsettling truth about the killer comes to light.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Buttons & Bugs'. When popular young mother goes missing, her disappearance is a mystery. After a four-month search, police find her body, and a chilling murder is revealed.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Murder In The Park'. A single mother is brutally assaulted and left in a secluded park to die. As the police investigate, they discover a trail of blind loyalty and deadly betrayal.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Killer Stepdad'. When Lesley Ford and four of her children disappear from a Cornish village, her husband claims they left him without a trace. But police are suspicious.

programme.desc: 'S7/E16 - The Man Who Got Away'. Video footage, police interview tapes and courtroom footage reveal the double lives of the US's most terrifying killers and abductors before they were caught.

programme.title: Kiss Of Death

programme.title: Kiss Of Death
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Highway To Hell'. When Brandon Duran meets tattooed pin-up girl Amber at a motorcycle rally, he is smitten by her sassy attitude. But her plans for their wedding have a satanic twist.

programme.desc: 'S12/E21 of 26'. Navorsers bereken dat ongeveer 10% van mense ouer as 60, een of ander vorm van mishandeling of misdaad elke jaar ervaar. Kundiges gesels oor veiligheid vir seniors.

programme.title: La't Wiel
programme.desc: 'S27/E7'. Die nuutste Range Rover P530 is die toppunt van weelde. Die Kia Carnival maak 'n goeie indruk en die Honda BR-V is 'n heel veelsydige ryding, maar met 'n probleem.

programme.title: Wie's Nuus
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 of 15'. Afrikaanssprekendes is boos nadat Charlize Theron gesê het daar is slegs sowat 44 wat die taal praat. Was dit 'n onskuldige grap en is Afrikaans in gevaar?

programme.title: Spreekkamer
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 of 13'. November is nasionale diabetes maand, ons gesels meer hieroor. 'n Chirurg gesels oor bariatriese chirurgie en 'n pasiënt wat meer as 100kg verloor het deel haar ervaring van die proses.

programme.title: Dankie, Lottoland
programme.desc: 'S6/E8 of 13'. Aktrise en aanbieder Edrien Erasmus reis na Huis Helen Bellinghanhof in Oudtshoorn. Sy deel goeie nuus van Lottoland wat wense waar maak, en die tehuis nuwe hoop gee in 'n tyd van nood.

programme.title: Die Real Housewives van Pretoria
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 of 14'. Kiki en Mel is by 'n boksgeveg tussen bekendes waar Mel, Kiki se ware bedoelings begin bevraagteken. Tydens Rhona se Ou Klere Funksie daag 'n ongenooide gas op wat nie almal beïndruk nie.

programme.title: Prontuit
programme.desc: 'S9/E21 of 17'. Wat kan gebeur wanneer gemeenskappe bymekaar kom om hul verwaarloosde en vervalle dorpe te verbeter?

programme.title: Ontbyt Grotes
programme.desc: 'S8/E16'. 'n Saamgestelde program wat die week se hoogtepunte van Die Groot Ontbyt bevat.

programme.title: Koppieteefontein
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 of 13'. Jak de Priester kuier die week in Pretoria by die huis van beroemde Steinway Pianis, Charl du Plessis.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S8/E171 of 218'. Danni speel speurder, terwyl Keith sy geskiedenis met Justin begin ontbloot. Mymoena moedig AB aan om 'n projek te soek wat hom besig kan hou.

programme.title: Oppiestoep
programme.desc: 'S7/E8 of 13'. Bok van Blerk kom kuier saam met Nico Smit op die Stoep. Oom Poem Mooney van Oudtshoorn kom maak ook weer 'n draai. Die talentvolle Loki Rothman maak lekker musiek saam met Schalk Joubert.

programme.title: eNuus
programme.desc: 'S13/E239 of 306'. Daaglikse nuushooftrekke, sporthoogtepunte en weervooruitskouing in Afrikaans.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S12/E125 of 172'. Nicolette is nog lank nie klaar met haar speletjies nie. Steve probeer alles in die stryd werp om met Ieva te kan praat. 'n Nies verander 'n vermoede, en Gaby rig 'n waarskuwing aan Liam.

programme.title: Toks & Tjops
programme.desc: 'S12/E41 of 37'. 'n Informele kletsprogram waar Toks van der Linde, Breyten Paulse en Janina Oberholzer saam met gaste na die jongste rugbygebeure kyk. Ons gaan elke week lekker braai, sing en rugby.

programme.title: Jan Braai Vir Erfenis
programme.desc: 'S12/E21 of 26'. Heelwat pluimvee tree op in die week se episode. Moenie de hoenders in raak nie, hoenders is daar. Die episode is ook geseënd met eend. Die resepte vir volstruis hoort tuis in 'n kluis.

programme.title: Wanderlus
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 of 13'. In hierdie week se episode, reis ons saam met Hennie en Nicole na Wellington, deur die Ceres-vallei tot in die beeldskone Tankwa Karoo.

programme.title: Hier Gaan Ons Alweer
programme.desc: 'S21/E8 of 13'. Na nog 'n vinnige sessie by die Vaalrivier, soek die span groot papgooikarpe in die Bosveld en ervaar ook hoe die karpe kuitskiet. Petri gaan vang dan 'n absolute monsterkarp in die Weskaap.
