programme.title: Bill Maher: #Adulting
programme.desc: Taking to stage for his 12th HBO stand-up special, Bill Maher delivers a hilarious and scathing commentary on the latest hot-button issues.

programme.title: Yvonne Orji: A Whole Me
programme.desc: Picking up where her debut special left off, Emmy-nominated Yvonne Orji returns to the stage to offer her point-of-view on the pandemic, being the child of Nigerian immigrants and much more.

programme.title: Charming The Hearts Of Men
programme.desc: A drama set during the politically charged early 60s. With the help of a Congressional ally, a woman inspires historic legislation which allows opportunities never before afforded to women.

programme.title: A Valentine's Match
programme.desc: An enjoyable romantic film. After returning home, a jobless reality TV host is tricked into running the town's Valentine's Day festival auction with her ex-fiancé.

programme.title: Switched
programme.desc: An enlightening teen drama centred around a body swap. A bullied teen's wish comes true as she magically swaps bodies with the most popular girl in high school.

programme.title: Love In The Forecast
programme.desc: In this charming romantic film, an aspiring meteorologist swears off dating to concentrate on her career. However, she soon finds herself suddenly pursued by men everywhere.

programme.title: Bill And Ted's Bogus Journey
programme.desc: The future is a peaceful place due to a simple 20th century song by Bill and Ted. Wanting to rule, an evil tyrant sends robots back in time to kill the duo.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: With a star-studded voice cast, this animation is about a journey of bravery and unexpected friendship as a dragon, a boy, and a mountain spirit look for a haven for dragons.

programme.title: RV
programme.desc: Director Barry Sonnenfeld (Men In Black) unleashes Robin Williams' comedic genius in this family road trip movie about a dysfunctional family trying to bond - in an RV!

programme.title: High Strung Free Dance
programme.desc: The dance sequences in this sequel to 2016's High Strung are just as epic. A choreographer gives a dancer and a pianist their big break by casting them in his Broadway show.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Adam Sandler and Selena Gomez lend their voices to this supernatural animation. Count Dracula runs a hotel for monsters, but his problems begin when a human boy decides to stay.

programme.title: Daddy's Home 2
programme.desc: A chaos-filled sequel sees Will Ferrell and Mark Wahlberg return for more comedy. Co-parents Brad and Dusty must contend with their respective fathers who come to visit for the holidays.

programme.title: Barely Lethal
programme.desc: Jaime King (Sin City) and Samuel L. Jackson star in this action adventure. A teenage special ops agent fakes her own death so she can live a normal young life in high school.

programme.title: Die In A Gunfight
programme.desc: Fists and bullets fly in this modern-day Romeo and Juliet love story. When youngsters of two feuding families fall in love, violence erupts around them. Will their love win?

programme.title: Jerrod Carmichael: Rothaniel
programme.desc: Jerrod Carmichael delivers a deeply personal and hilarious HBO comedy special live at the famous Blue Note Jazz Club in New York City.

programme.title: The Night Before
programme.desc: Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Seth Rogen and Anthony Mackie make up a hazardous trio of friends that turn Christmas on its head, in this heartfelt, chaos filled comedy.

programme.title: The Night Before
programme.desc: Joseph Gordon-Levitt, Seth Rogen and Anthony Mackie make up a hazardous trio of friends that turn Christmas on its head, in this heartfelt, chaos filled comedy.

programme.title: Kiss The Cook
programme.desc: This romantic comedy revolves around food, family, and love. A food blogger lands a cookbook deal, but she's not a good cook, so she gets help from a chef.

programme.title: Vic The Viking And The Magic Sword
programme.desc: A great kids animation. The son of the Viking Chief, who compensates for his lack of Viking physicality with intelligence, uses his intellect to help solve his father's mistake.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend Of The Seven Seas
Beyond Beyond
programme.desc: A great furry animation. While his father is away gathering provisions for their ship, young hare receives word about his long lost mother, so he embarks on an adventure.

programme.title: C.I.Ape
programme.desc: An animal-powered spy movie for the whole family. In the espionage world, some missions require an agent with unique skills. This is a job for C.I.Ape.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Paddington's delightful adventures continue in this BAFTA-nominated sequel. After a beloved book is stolen, Paddington and the Browns must find the crafty thief behind the crime.

programme.title: Reminiscence
programme.desc: Hugh Jackman leads a great cast that drives this cerebral sci-fi. A case a private investigator of the mind is navigating becomes an obsession after his client disappears.

programme.title: Nikki Glaser: Good Clean Filth
programme.desc: In a manner that is brutally honest yet conversational, watch comedian Nikki Glaser explore a range of topics often considered 'taboo' in her first HBO comedy special.

programme.desc: This emotional tale is based on a tragic real-life incident. The life of a young Chinese-American cop unravels after accidentally shooting an innocent African-American man.

programme.title: Basebenzi Part 2
programme.desc: The staff at the hotel are faced with a dilemma: the business is not doing well and they have to convince the owners to keep the hotel running. How will they do it?

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Mamoruti
programme.desc: A rebellious woman feels the need to break free from her over-protective parents. She finds her voice when she finds love in the most unexpected place.

programme.title: Imizamo Yethu

programme.title: Ukuqonywa
programme.desc: A young man faces the difficulties of being a single parent after losing his wife in a car accident.

programme.title: Pastor Bae
programme.desc: A handsome pastor comes to lead a struggling church, but the community rejects him when his dark past and true identity is revealed.

programme.title: Thandeka
programme.desc: A naive young student gets swept up in the superficial world of the most popular girl in school who is hiding a very dark secret from her peers and the community.

programme.title: Motlholo Wa Ngwedi
programme.desc: Two childhood sweethearts start questioning their union after a tragedy befalls them. Will their relationship crumble under pressure, or will they find their way back to love?

programme.title: Umapendane
programme.desc: A young man finds himself tangled in a web of lies when he tries to impress a beautiful girl from a well-to-do family.

programme.title: Amamene-Mene
programme.desc: Two star-crossed lovers from different worlds are faced with the difficult decision of continuing on the same path or going back to what was familiar and safe.

programme.title: Inkwekwezi
programme.desc: An ambitious athlete does everything in her power to impress her sports devotee father. Her world changes when she loses him suddenly.

programme.title: Panda
programme.desc: When the owners of a house go away on a honeymoon, their gardener pretends to own the house in order to lure women and boost his self-esteem.

programme.title: Umlaleli

programme.title: Masupa
programme.desc: Noni and her father, Madzara, bond through their shared passion for dance. They attempt to secure a dance scholarship by making a short dance film.

programme.title: Mr Lava - Lava
programme.desc: Two competitive brothers fight for the right to take over from their powerful inyanga father, with hilarious consequences.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Nyale
programme.desc: A young woman receives a rude awakening when the will her father left reveals that she can only get her inheritance after she gets married.

programme.title: Izwe Lami Nawe
programme.desc: A young gay man is in love with one of his classmates. However, his father is putting pressure on him to marry a girl from his neighbourhood.

programme.title: Izakhamuzi
programme.desc: A moving story about a Congolese barber whose new life in South Africa is marred by scandal when he's accused of a crime he did not commit.

programme.title: Dadwethu
programme.desc: After her husband cheats on her with her sister, a young woman decides to give them another chance. Unfortunately, her sister isn't one to give up easily.

programme.title: Mr Lava - Lava
programme.desc: Two competitive brothers fight for the right to take over from their powerful inyanga father, with hilarious consequences.

programme.title: Ke Mofumane
programme.desc: A homeless man saves a beautiful young lady from an impending assault. She soon realises that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Hawe Ma
programme.desc: A former actress registers in the same university drama course as her daughter. Rivalry erupts between the pair when the mom is cast in the lead role.

programme.desc: A former actress registers in the same university drama course as her daughter. Rivalry erupts between the pair when the mom is cast in the lead role.

programme.title: Isifungo
programme.desc: A woman's life falls apart when she discovers that her husband is being unfaithful.

programme.title: Imbali
programme.desc: A young woman is getting married and her adoptive father is delighted. However, when her biological father arrives, a battle between the two fathers begins.

programme.title: Ilangatye 2
programme.desc: A paranormal drama about Sima, a professional stick fighter who also possesses powers that can raise or kill her bloodline.

programme.title: Bohloko Baka

programme.title: Iphupho - The Dream
programme.desc: A teacher quits his job to follow a man who pretends to have the right political connections while he swindles the community.

programme.title: Amadreadlocks
programme.desc: When Wanele wears a dead woman's dreadlocks, the owner of the dreadlocks starts haunting her for stealing her man.

programme.title: Skhanda Love
programme.desc: A desperate man steals a diamond ring from an elderly woman. He gets more than he bargained for when he discovers the ring is haunted by the elderly woman's late husband.

programme.title: Treasure
programme.desc: Mpilo is happily married but has a poor opinion of women. When he meets a young woman at work, they begin an affair, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Ngixolele
programme.desc: Staring at the site of death, a father returns to his son seeking forgiveness after abandoning him and his mother.

programme.title: Our House
programme.desc: A young man is faced with a difficult decision when he has to choose whether to follow his childhood dream or settle down with the love of his life.

programme.title: The Spy Who Dumped Me
programme.desc: Mila Kunis and Kate McKinnon star in this chaotic comedy. Two best friends accidentally become entangled in an international conspiracy, when one of them discovers that her ex is a spy.

programme.title: A New York Christmas Wedding
programme.desc: Two-time Golden Globe nominee Chris Noth stars in this heartfelt holiday film. A soon-to-be-married woman is visited by an angel who shows her another version of her life.

programme.title: Action Kommandant: The Untold Story...

programme.title: Kingdoms Of Fire, Ice & Fairytales
programme.desc: Explore three of Earth's epic wilderness in this film by the creators of the multi-award-winning wildlife documentary 'Stroop: Journey into the Rhino Horn War.'

programme.title: In Other Words
programme.desc: A funny rom-com about a tech geek who travels with pals to Mexico to prove that his algorithm isn't crazy after his dating app pairs him with a beautiful non-English speaking girl.

programme.title: Seventh Son
programme.desc: Oscar winners Jeff Bridges and Julianne Moore star in this edgy fantasy adventure. A monster hunter and his new recruit take on an evil witch and her dark and deadly forces.

programme.title: Pride & Prejudice
programme.desc: BAFTA winning director Joe Wright leads Keira Knightley in this period drama based on Jane Austen's classic novel. A rich single man falls for a woman that is beneath his class.

programme.title: Adventures Of Thomas And Felix
programme.desc: A family adventure film about Thomas and his imaginary friend. Hoping he makes real friends, his parents send him to summer camp, but Thomas escapes and runs away into the wood.

programme.title: Catwoman

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: Gerard Butler and Morena Baccarin drive this chaos-filled film. As comet fragments hit the earth, a family scrambles to safety while the world around them turns into chaos.

programme.title: Lying And Stealing
programme.desc: A thrilling heist movie. It is a dangerous game for an art thief who wants out of the criminal life. But he has to buy his way out, so he teams up with an actress.

programme.title: I Am Mortal
programme.desc: A gripping sci-fi set 200 years in the future when humanity has achieved immortality. But a small band of rebels seeks to overthrow the status quo and reclaim their right to die.

programme.title: A Royal Christmas Engagement
programme.desc: A pleasant holiday romance movie. A prince, disguised as a commoner, finds love with an advertising executive during the holiday season.

programme.title: Jingle All The Way 2
programme.desc: This frantic and fun family comedy sees a desperate dad go head to head with his daughter's step-dad to get his hands on the one toy his daughter wants more than anything.

programme.title: Solis
programme.desc: A thrilling sci-fi, driven by survival. After a space mining operation goes bad, Troy is on an emergency escape vehicle drifting towards the sun. Can someone save him in time?

programme.title: Juliet, Naked
programme.desc: A love triangle drives this all-star comedy. A woman's in a toxic relationship with a man obsessed with a musician. But things get complicated when his obsession enters their lives.

programme.title: Miss Virginia
programme.desc: A powerful movie about change based on a true story. A struggling inner-city mother sacrifices everything to get her son out of a dangerous school and give him a good education.

programme.title: Mortal Engines
programme.desc: Post-apocalyptic adventure from Peter Jackson. In a world where mobile cities consume each other to survive, a trio of outcasts become entangled in a deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Heatstroke

programme.title: Batman V Superman: Dawn Of Justice
programme.desc: The Man of Steel and the Dark Knight face-off in an epic battle in this much-anticipated superhero epic from director Zack Snyder.

programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Cloud of the Month / A. Plumber'. After receiving the 'Cloud of the Month' award, Parker gets a big head, After clogging the toilet, Parker calls a plumber - who winds up being Ryan in disguise.

programme.title: Morning Live

programme.desc: 'S5/E89 - Mr. Petracelli's Revenge'. In order to inherit Victor's old classic car, Booker must get straight A's. But Raven's old teacher, Mr. Petracelli, swears there's no way Booker will earn an A in his class.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Innocent Until Proven Ghostly / Twin Trouble'. Molly tries to prove Scratch's innocence when he's falsely accused of a crime. Dad struggles to stay true to himself when his twin siblings come to visit.

programme.title: The Ghost and Molly McGee
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Goat Your Own Way / the Very Hungry Ghost'. Molly insists on training an unruly goat the 'Molly way'. When the McGees celebrate a Thai holiday about feeding 'hungry ghosts', Scratch tries to keep the feast all to himself.

programme.title: Ultra Violet & Black Scorpion
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Ultra Violet Unmasked'. After Luis Leon snaps a photo of Ultra Violet unmasking herself, she enlists the help of Maya to stop him from revealing her true identity.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E39 - Sleepwalk This Way'. Miley starts sleepwalking and telling the truth to everyone, which gets her into trouble with the school's strictest teacher.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Straight Outta Time'. Griffin and Harper learn the camp dance is coming up, and that is the day Savannah went missing! Later, Harper meets Jess, and learns her mother did go to camp and hated Savannah!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E104 - 4/104'. Shadow Moth's trap closes in on Ladybug and Cat Noir, threatening to turn their fate upside down forever...

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E79 - Truth'. A friend of Marinette's gets akumatized into Truth. Using his power to force people to tell the truth, he wants to know Marinette's secret...and Ladybug and Cat Noir's, too!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E80 - Lies'. A friend of Adrien's get akumatized into Lies. Able to make liars disappear, she is determined to rid the world of lies and those who tell them...including superheroes!

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E39 - Sleepwalk This Way'. Miley starts sleepwalking and telling the truth to everyone, which gets her into trouble with the school's strictest teacher.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E30 - Cricket's Place, Volunteer Tilly'. Remy and Cricket get their own apartment, but discover non-stop fun leads to chaos. Tilly volunteers at the animal shelter but doesn't want to part with any of the animals.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Smart And Smarter'. When Chase only gets an A minus he is determined to become Student of the Semester. He installs attendance and healthy eating monitors, which don't improve his popularity.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E28 - Love (Really) Hurts'. Otto is determined to impress Bella by joining Cameron's wrestling team. He uses a magic splinter to make him a champion wrestler.

programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - The Treasure in the Castle'. Disney Channel features classic cartoons and popular new animated characters, as well as live action sitcoms and an unrivaled range of classic Disney feature films.

programme.desc: 'S3/E37'. Alex and his friends are attending their third high school year. They will have to face new challenges and work together to get ahead in the music world.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Little White Big Fat Lie'. Bella's determined to end Iggi's deception and uses splinter magic to make a 'truth ray'. But Bella hits Alice with the ray, just when she needs to pull off a lie she has told Jed.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S3/E36'. Alex and his friends are attending their third high school year. They will have to face new challenges and work together to get ahead in the music world.

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Crash and Cash'. Binny and Melchior do not believe that Mark's scooter is totaled and head over to the body shop where they make an interesting discovery..

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E36 - Vampire Luau'. Unaware that Davorin is free, Bella celebrates being accepted to fashion school and the gang arrange a party.

programme.title: The Evermoor Chronicles
programme.desc: 'S2/E33 - Race to Stink Island'. Ludo remembers he was filming on his phone the night he was shattered. Everyone races to the island to find the phone and the evidence on it. But betrayal and heartbreak also await.

programme.title: Alex And Co
programme.desc: 'S3/E39'. Alex and his friends are attending their third high school year. They will have to face new challenges and work together to get ahead in the music world.

programme.title: Violetta

programme.title: Binny And The Ghost
programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - The Treasure in the Castle'. Disney Channel features classic cartoons and popular new animated characters, as well as live action sitcoms and an unrivaled range of classic Disney feature films.

programme.title: Ducktales
programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!'. Della struggles for survival against dangerous elements of the Moon, as she looks for a way to get back to her family on Earth,

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S2/E27 - Scavenger Hunt/ the Plantars Check in'. The gang goes on a mission! Sprig's spending spree.

programme.title: Amphibia
programme.desc: 'S2/E28 - Lost in Newtopia/Sprig Gets Schooled'. Anne and Polly take in the city. Sprig, college bound!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And...
programme.desc: 'Miraculous: Tales Of Ladybug And Cat Noir. S4/E82'. Mr. Ramier gets akumatized into Mr. Pigeon for the 72nd time, and now, he can turn people into evil pigeons!

programme.title: Amphibia

programme.title: Amphibia

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S2/E36 - Llama Drama'. Chase guarding the team mascot's dingo costume, but their rivals steal it. Chase retaliates by stealing their llama costume, but it swallows some nanobots with unfortunate consequences.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Night Bill/Cheap Snake'. Cricket Green's family moves from the country to Big City. As they acclimatize, their perspectives on differences between country and city are revealed in an entertaining way.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
programme.desc: 'S2/E40 - Song Sung Bad'. Lilly records a song for her mother but isn't very pleased with it, so Miley steps in to improve it. Jackson tries to tell Sarah that Rico likes her, but she thinks Jackson fancies her.

programme.title: Secrets Of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Time to Face the Music'. Harper and Griffin learn that young Jess rigged the talent show out of her hatred for Savannah. They vow to go back and stop Jess from causing Savannah's disappearance.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: 'S2/E32 - Urban Legend, Wishing Well'. Gramma convinces the neighbours she's a witch, and Bill throws a barbeque. Cricket's scheme to cash in on a wishing well snares Tilly, leaving Cricket with a dilemma.

programme.title: Lab Rats
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Bionic Birthday Fail'. It's Leo's birthday. The Lab Rats have never had a party of their own so they decide to throw a surprise one for Leo. Trouble is, they get so involved with the arrangements they forget to ask Leo!

programme.title: Lab Rats

programme.desc: 'S2/E29 - Rags to Riches'. Iggi mislays the map of the cryptstones and Alice was the only other person to see it. So Iggi asks her on her first ever 'date' in order to get the cryptstone locations from her.

programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Escape From Area 51'. After an informant tells of an alien that reportedly escaped from Area 51, Chuck and the team go to Tonopah, NV, to investigate whether it still roams the area.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Gold'. Gold is one of the most valuable treasures on Earth. Since ancient times, man has gone to extreme lengths to get it. But where is most of the gold today, and who owns it?

programme.title: Uncovering Aliens
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Alien Harvesting'. Blood sucking aliens bring the team to Indiana. After some disturbing reports, the team are hot on the trail of a case of aliens allegedly stealing human blood.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti
Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Captured'. A picturesque rainbow camouflages an extra-terrestrial teleportation device.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Return Of The Yeti'. Josh Gates heads into the Himalayas to obtain scientific evidence of the Yeti. This time his mission is personal and takes him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - The Lunch That Changed America'. Don Wildman investigates a prison fortress in London. He also examines a sculpture honouring civil rights and tells the tale of an esteemed novelist.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Freedom Balloon'. Don Wildman examines a wall that gave rise to daring escapes. He gazes at a star that marks a Hollywood scandal and honours the statue of a pioneering scientist.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Nightmare Below Zero'. A man on a night-time snowmobile ride suddenly feels something has been implanted in his leg. And, an otherworldly beast stalks a family over three generations.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Ruby Fever'. All winter long, the miner's dream of the rubies discovered atop an almost impossible-to-reach ridge just as winter's window closes in on them.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Secret Prisons'. A secret part of history has remained hidden, locked away for centuries in the hulls of ships in New York or in the depths of an abandoned copper mine.

programme.title: Uncovering Aliens
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Black Ops Conspiracy'. Many people believe that Arizona is the centre of a government cover-up of alien activity. The team travel to Sedona, a known hotspot, to investigate.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Out Of Thin Air'. Josh's quest takes him from the frozen slopes of Mount Everest to the isolated forests of Bhutan. He uses bait to try and force an encounter with the beast.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - JFK UFO Conspiracy'. A potentially disastrous fuel leak forces three astronauts to make a risky return to earth. And a NASA lunar probe reveals a mysterious crashed craft on the moon.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Castle
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Mummy Curse And Nazi Art Hoax'. Don Wildman investigates a deadly pharaoh's curse. Plus, he reveals the truth behind a secret operation to sell phony art to the Nazis.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Believer'. Ozzy and Sharon sit down to watch footage of suspected poltergeists, haunted dolls and UFOs. Can Jack convince his parents that these supernatural forces exist?

programme.title: Haunted Towns
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Falls River, MA'. In Massachusetts, the team investigates the home of the alleged murderer, Lizzie Borden. Was she responsible for the crimes, or under the control of a dark force?

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Dead Men Tell Tales'. Amy Bruni, Adam Berry and Chip Coffey investigate a jail in Florida. Rumours suggest murderous spirits are lurking in this property.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Shrewsbury Prison'. Nick and Katrina unlock the dark secrets of HMS Shrewsbury Prison in England, exploring 200 years of executions, anger and tragedy - and discovering new threats.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: 'S11/E10 - The Blurry Man'. Amy and Steve head to Illinois, where a panic-stricken family claims life in their new home has been hellish. The parents fear their kids could get seriously hurt.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Monument
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 - Black Magic Rocket Scientist'. Don Wildman heads to Pasadena, CA, to explore the mysterious death of a renowned scientist. He also examines one of Mt. Everest's deadliest disasters.

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Men In Black'. Strange men in black suits knock on the door of a UFO witness after an eerie light show. A woman is terrorized by small humanoid creatures that only she can see.

programme.title: Ice Cold Gold
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Belly Of The Red Beast'. The American miners have their sights set on what team geologist Eric Drummond believes could be the largest ruby deposit in the Arctic.

programme.title: Codes And Conspiracies
programme.desc: 'S3/E4 - Pearl Harbor'. December 7th, 1941 - a day of infamy that changed America forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did Franklin Roosevelt know about the attack beforehand?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt For The Yeti
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Unmasking The Myth'. In the finale, Josh rafts into the remotest corners of Bhutan to capture some of his best evidence yet of the reclusive Yeti.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Curse Of The Gas Giant'. Jupiter is hotter than it should be, and scientists are baffled. There's a strange discovery on Mars and detectives ask for NASA's help on a murder cold case.

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Eastern State Penitentiary'. Jack Osbourne and Katrina Weidman travel to Philadelphia to gain unprecedented access to one of the US's oldest and potentially haunted prisons.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Chasing Skinwalkers'. Paul investigates evil shapeshifters known as skinwalkers. He tracks these mythical beasts from the heart of the Navajo Nation to the infamous Skinwalker Ranch.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Breaking All The Rules'. Jack introduces his parents to the spooky mystery of the Aswang. Plus, Ozzy is baffled by a video of suspected poltergeist activity.

programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. In hierdie episode is jong verloofdes Kayla en Darren op soek na hul eerste huis in Brakpan. Tydens hul ontmoeting met eiendomsagent Calvin word dit duidelik dat Darren kompromieë moet aangaan, want Kayla se smaak spel Sandton.

programme.title: Plan Van Aksie
programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Dinge raak kleurvol in Kemptonpark. Aaanbieders Nadine Vosloo en Hamilton Wessels help vir Jannie en Annemarie du Randt om hul TV-kamer 'n bietjie kleur te gee.

programme.title: Dr. Nou
programme.desc: 'S4/E3'. Tammy is 'n lewenslustig met 'n lewe vól uitdagings en wonderwerke. As kind is sy gediagnoseer met neonatale allo-immuun trombositopenie en wil vandag ander inspireer om die beste en mooiste weergawe van hulself te wees.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E7'. James Faber, voorsitter van die RPO, boer saam met sy broer Gert en dié se seun, Jaco, met besproeiingsgewasse en vee naby Barkly-Wes in die Noord-Kaap. Bek-en-klouseer is een van die kopsorge wat ons bespreek.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E3'. Lynette Francis-Puren ontmoet vir Danie Bester - 'n boer wat dinge reg doen! Hy is daarop ingestel om alle tegnologie, saad- en gewasbeskerming rég te gebruik vir die behoud van die tegnologie sowel as die natuur.

programme.title: Privaatspeurders
programme.desc: 'S1/E13'. Privaatspeurder Luke Enslin staan sy kliënte by om 'n saak van statutêre verkragting te open ná hul dogter op dertien swanger raak.

programme.title: Agter Tralies
programme.desc: 'S4/E13'. In 'n oogwink kan alles verander, wat wel die geval was toe Johan binne 'n kwessie van 'n splitsekonde rooi gesien en beheer verloor het. Dié tragiese insident het baie lewens verwoes.

programme.title: Mooi: Frankryk
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Anet Pienaar-Vosloo kuier by Petré en Carina Prins en leer hoe hierdie hardwerkende Suid-Afrikaners 'n vervalle ou Franse huisie omskep in 'n oase van rustigheid.

programme.title: Uit Die Slaapkamer
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Dr. Elna gee advies oor die behoud van ereksies onder ouer mans. 'n Ouer wil weet hoe hulle homoseksualiteit vir hul kinders se maats kan verduidelik.

programme.title: Minki
programme.desc: 'S13/E7'. Wanneer jy Manuel Escórcio in Afrikaans hoor sing, sou jy nooit kon dink sy moedertaal is eintlik Portugees nie. Hy vertel van sy vroeë kinderjare in Mosambiek en hoe sy sangtalent ontdek is. Ons verras hom met 'n mede-sanger.

programme.title: Meer As Grond
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Ons kuier in Grabouw op die Paul Clüver Familielandgoed waar Lynette Francis-Puren uitvind hoe hulle vrugte- en wynproduksiemetodes aangepas is om klimaatsverandering teen te werk deur die natuur aan die stuur te sit.

programme.title: Slim Vang Sy Baas
programme.desc: 'S6/E2'. Die spanne Blitslim en Rissiepit sê mekaar die stryd aan in agt rondes van algemene kennis en ander lekker speletjies. Wie stap moontlik weg met 'n kontantprys van R10 000?

programme.title: Martelize Se Stamtafel
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. In dié kook-en-geselsprogram kuier die radio-omroeper, Martelize Brink, met bekendes in haar kombuis en kook disse uit hul plek van herkoms. Haar gaste leer ook meer oor hul eie stambome.

programme.title: Landbouweekliks
programme.desc: 'S19/E6'. Alan en Frances Webster het 30 jaar gelede met skaars 20 koeie naby Weenen in KZN begin melk. Vandag is daar meer as 1 200 koeie in produksie en dié egpaar woeker moedig voort.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Blokraaibestes
programme.desc: 'S3/E6'. Ons is op soek na die land se blokraai-boffin. Drie deelnemers se woordeskat en taalkennis word op die proef gestel om te kyk wie uiteindelik blokraai-koning kraai. Cintaine Schutte is die aanbieder.

programme.title: Musiekpaniek
programme.desc: 'S8/E8'. Die week het Synth Peter die plaas verruil vir Musiekpaniek se diskoligte. Hy en Carla Mackenzie kyk hoe vier van sy aanhangers dit uitbaklei vir 'n lekker prys.

programme.title: Houvrou of Trouvrou?
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Dis die halfpadmerk in die stryd om SA se top-trouvrou te kroon en Chanté en Leandri is bo-aan die punteleer. Dié keer kyk ons of die vroue tussen die lyne kan lees of hul intuïsie moet slyp. Wie's 'n stap nader aan die R500 000?

programme.title: Kom Ons Braai: Familie En Vriende
programme.desc: 'S3/E4'. Ons gunstelingtydverdryf is nou 'n sosiale eksperiment. Drie paartjies wat mekaar nie ken nie, braai by mekaar en heelwat gebeur om die vuur. En ons praat nie net van die lekker kos nie!

programme.title: Die Bruid-boetiek
programme.desc: 'S3/E10'. Diaan help 'n bruid wat baie wil blink op haar troudag. Chantel-Lee soek 'n rok vir haar vriendin se pa se verloofde en Diaan maak 'n gewaagde goue nommer vir 'n matriekafskeid.

programme.title: Slim Vang Sy Baas
programme.desc: 'S6/E3'. Die twee spanne trio's, Mal Trio en Seespan, spook dit uit teen mekaar in algemene kennis en nostalgiese speletjies om te sien wie moontlik kan wegstap met R10 000.

programme.title: Houvrou of Trouvrou?
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Een van die eienskappe waaroor elke trouvrou moet beskik, is stylvolheid. En vandag moet ons agt vroue hul beste voetjies voorsit. Kedeshia en Neenã moet saam 'n besluit neem wat die hele groep sal affekteer.

programme.title: Huisgenoot Ware...
programme.desc: 'Huisgenoot Ware Lewensdramas: Vlees En Bloed. S1/E7'. Wanneer Wilmar Valentine skoolgronde betree en daarna Erin Fourie 22 keer met 'n mes steek, wonder die hele land wat regtig deur so 'n persoon se gedagtes gaan om dit te kan doen.

programme.title: Die Bruid-boetiek
programme.desc: 'S3/E10'. Diaan help 'n bruid wat baie wil blink op haar troudag. Chantel-Lee soek 'n rok vir haar vriendin se pa se verloofde en Diaan maak 'n gewaagde goue nommer vir 'n matriekafskeid.

programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - GPS Tracking'. Thakane puts a GPS tracking bracelet on Atleha. Mapule is relieved to learn that everything is sorted regarding Zondo. Tselane is not pleased when she learns about Maru's 'business trip'.

programme.desc: 'S1/E7'. Zaza's father left him with R5.6 million. He spent it on parties, fancy cars and get-aways. He is given a chance to rebuild his father's legacy and return to running an advertising business.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Nyaope Indaba
programme.desc: A group of nyaope addicts gets together to smoke, get high and pass out. But then they wake up to find a dead body next to them. Who could be responsible?

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: A Lifetime Of Tears
programme.desc: A man whose wife died tragically meets a woman who helps him heal by working through the pain. He falls for her, but there is a secret that could destroy their love.

programme.title: Zim Zim

programme.title: Lappies

programme.desc: 'S1/E50'. Dee Dee and Spike, the children's dance series: Each episode takes you to a fun place and teaches children playful dance moves, whilst building on their vocabulary.

programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. My Life In Music is a show hosted by Thabo Mokwele and filmed entirely in a radio studio. Inspirational people tell their life stories, set against the background of and influenced by music.

programme.title: Isithembiso
programme.desc: 'S1/E158'. Claudia is put under pressure to sign a deal with the devil. Palesa says goodbye to the good life.

programme.title: Gomora
programme.desc: 'S2/E44'. Sonto finds herself faced with a hard choice and confronted with a new truth about herself. Teddy and Sibongile start to thaw towards each other as they connect over their losses.

programme.title: Lingashoni
programme.desc: 'S1/E120'. Puleng discovers a part of Seipati's blood chilling secret. Prudence throws herself in the line of fire. Love is in the air in the Nondumo house.

programme.title: The Queen
programme.desc: 'S5/E129'. Unhappy with Charles's presence, Brutus takes matters into his own hands. Skhumbuzo is on the trail of the person who stole his money.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E104 - Team Sports'. Lindani puts Nomonde on the spot and Cobra starts swimming with deadly sharks.

programme.title: Greed And Desire
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Cleaning Boss'. Thakane introduces the staff to their new boss. Mapule is disturbed when she learns what Zondo wants, in exchange of dropping the charges.

programme.title: Abo Makoti
programme.desc: An honest and dedicated mama's boy finds his morals and values compromised when his mother puts pressure on him to take a wife and settle down.

programme.title: Gomora
programme.desc: 'S2/E44'. Sonto finds herself faced with a hard choice and confronted with a new truth about herself. Teddy and Sibongile start to thaw towards each other as they connect over their losses.

programme.desc: 'S5/E129'. Unhappy with Charles's presence, Brutus takes matters into his own hands. Skhumbuzo is on the trail of the person who stole his money.

programme.title: Kgaratlho
programme.desc: After losing her job, a young mother is seduced into a relationship with a man who promises to take care of her every need. But at what cost?

programme.title: The Ranakas
programme.desc: 'S5/E5'. Ntate Ranaka teaches his sons about the responsibilities attached to their roles as uncles following a tragic loss in the family. Manaka and KG bond in an unconventional way.

programme.title: Our Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: 'S10/E15'. In fairy tales a kiss can turn a frog into a prince and a wicked spell can be broken by 'true love's kiss'. On OPW we count down the best kisses.

programme.title: Date My Family
programme.desc: 'S7/E13'. 33-year-old IT specialist Benjamin Dube is an introvert and loves being indoors. He is looking for a lady that is down-to-earth, brilliant in the kitchen and loves church.

programme.title: Gomora
programme.desc: 'S2/E45'. Sonto, Mazet and Thathi are locked into a confrontation that forces them to re-evaluate their lives. Don is forced to make a decision when he's reminded of the reality of his new situation.

programme.title: The River
programme.desc: 'S2/E105 - Deals & Denials'. It's two steps forward and two steps back for Nomonde while Paulina gets dragged into another mess created by the man she once thought she'd spend the rest of her life with.

programme.title: The Queen
programme.desc: 'S5/E130'. Harriet has a request for Charles and Noma that sets off a dangerous chain reaction. Siyanda resorts to blackmail to solve her problems.

programme.title: Becoming...
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. Gina's friends go down memory lane. Yaya goes on a search for her mother and visits her family home. Gina's family remember her at the grave site.

programme.title: Mntase
programme.desc: 'S2/E5'. Promise and her sister are always fighting over portion sizes. Promise is adamant that she always ends up with less food on her plate whenever it's her sister's turn to dish up.

programme.title: Unmarried
programme.desc: 'S2/E7'. Thembi goes on a date with Pastor Bright. Brenda and Claudia go with her in case it turns out to be a serial killer catfish.

programme.title: Lokshin Bioskop: Ingadi
programme.desc: A greedy domestic worker wants to dig up a trunk full of money buried in her employer's garden. Things go awry when the neighbourhood servants want a share of the money.

programme.desc: 'S5/E19 - One Space At A Time'. A city inspector needs some design help. The Napiers pitch two different plans - to overhaul the kitchen and living room or create a private main suite.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: 'S6/E1'. One of the kids that Ben advised as a youth minister is all grown up and ready to buy his first home. Ben and Erin help him find a modern-style property.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: 'S6/E2 - Wraparound Porch'. In preparation for future grandchildren, a couple look for a big home with a wraparound porch and a shower room. What can Erin and Ben find with a $350,000 budget?

programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - First Apartment Blues'. Carmeon transforms a singer-songwriter's first apartment. But with a limited budget, rental restrictions, and storage bin furniture, it won't be easy!

programme.desc: 'S7/E12 - An Itty Bitty Beach Bungalow'. Mina and Karen are back in Old Southside where they look to transform a small, two-bedroom home into a beautiful beach bungalow on a modest budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: 'S26/E6 - Beach House In NC'. A family who adores the Outer Banks is hesitant about purchasing a beachfront home. Can they finally get the property they've always wanted?

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Family Ties'. In Atlanta, Alison finds a willing co-investor in her older brother. She transforms an outdated loft in one of the city's oldest buildings into a luxurious retreat.
